summary: Completed comprehensive testing of affiliate dashboard and identified routing issues with signup pages. Dashboard works perfectly with all components, but signup routes have configuration problems.

routing_bugs.issue: Child routes /signup/client and /signup/affiliate render generic signup form instead of specific forms
routing_bugs.root_cause: Parent route /signup renders its own component instead of using <Outlet /> for child routes

passed_tests: Header shows 'Affiliate Lab' title with menu and profile buttons
Available Balance card displays $12,450.00 with 12.4% revenue increase
Request Payout button is visible and clickable
Payout Schedule card shows Oct 28 date and $840.50 pending clearance with orange accent
Weekly Conversion Trend bar chart renders with 7 bars (MON-SUN) using recharts
High-Yield Campaigns section shows Aura Design with FEATURED badge and CloudSync Pro
Promote buttons exist and are clickable on campaign cards
View all campaigns link is visible and clickable
Priority Support card with Chat Now button is visible and clickable
Platform Updates section shows 3 update items with timestamps
Bottom navigation bar with HOME, CAMPAIGNS, PAYOUTS, SUPPORT tabs works correctly
Navigation tabs switch active state on click
Floating action button (FAB) is visible and clickable with correct positioning
Homepage CTA buttons link correctly to signup pages
Apply for Scale button links to /signup/affiliate
Hire for Scale button links to /signup/client
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix routing configuration: The /signup route should use <Outlet /> instead of rendering its own component, or restructure routes so /signup/client and /signup/affiliate are independent routes not nested under /signup. The specific client and affiliate signup components exist but are not being rendered due to routing issues.
